name: Breakfast Ball Golf Sim
address: 6650 Highland Rd Suite 113, Waterford Township, MI 48327
about: Breakfast Ball Golf Sim is a premier golf simulator facility powered by Trackman technology. The venue offers a range of services including hourly bay rentals, monthly memberships, golf lessons, leagues, tournaments, and private events. It is open to the public and provides options to suit various golfer needs, with an emphasis on quality technology and convenient booking. The facility features upgraded technology including a new Trackman iO system and a private room, and enforces a clean environment policy with a no-outdoor-shoes policy.
why_golfers_like_it: Features a premium Trackman iO launch monitor for accurate data and simulation
Offers private room booking for an intimate and focused experience
Provides a convenient online booking system to secure tee times in advance
Hosts a variety of leagues and tournaments for competitive play

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of on-site food service
No mention of on-site bar or alcohol service

simulator_hardware.notes: Newly upgraded system; one bay has been converted into a private room

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you are expected to bring your own clubs. The facility has a policy that clubs must be cleaned before use.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of a policy allowing or prohibiting outside food and drinks. The venue does not appear to have an on-site kitchen or bar.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a standard time for 18 holes, but league sessions are noted to run for two hours a night.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: There is no specific information provided about child-friendly amenities or policies. The presence of a pet dog suggests a casual environment, but kid-friendliness cannot be confirmed.
